title: Perfectly Roasted Venezuelan Beef Roast
description: A savory and romantic Venezuelan dish featuring a slow roasted beef roast, served with a side of ssamjang sauce, this recipe is satvik-friendly and perfect for special occasions. The result is a shattering tender beef roast that is sure to impress.

ingredients.name: beef roast
ingredients.notes: preferably prime rib or top round

instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven safe skillet over medium high heat.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until browned.
Add the garlic, onion, carrots, and potatoes to the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 2 hours.
After 2 hours, baste the beef roast with the ssamjang sauce.
Return the skillet to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let the beef roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Slice the beef roast against the grain and serve with the roasted vegetables and additional ssamjang sauce if desired.
